title: Aster tsuneoi
taxonomy: Aster tsuneoi is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to Japan and is a rare species. This plant is also known as Tsune's Aster. Aster tsuneoi is classified as a perennial herb, and it typically grows in mountainous regions. The classification of Aster tsuneoi is further supported by its distinct morphological characteristics and genetic makeup.
